strengths: Seven concrete pages each with distinct layout patterns and section lists
Strong editorial motif (salon-wall clustering, earthen palette, mixed serif/grotesque typography) directly fulfilling the seed
Rich interactions: faceted filters, sticky cart drawer, shipping calculator, make-an-offer, save-to-list with price-drop alerts
Detailed content model covering listing, storefront, journal, saved lists, orders
weaknesses: Aesthetic leans toward familiar editorial-marketplace territory (Tiempos/Söhne pairing is a common reference)
Provenance timeline and dimensions diagram are mentioned but not deeply differentiated from standard high-end marketplaces

strengths: Distinctive 'Drop' event mechanic gives the marketplace a time-bound, live feel that avoids generic catalog patterns
Patina Report and freight-route map are concrete, unusual modules tied to honest-wear thesis
Column-density slider (3/5/8) and masonry chaos are specific layout ideas not seen in typical templates
Picker's Log with location-tagged dispatches and shoppable hotspots gives the journal a unique voice
Seven pages with crisp section breakdowns and a clear mustard/brick/ink palette plus Druk/Caslon pairing
weaknesses: Drop countdown could overshadow always-on browsing if not handled carefully
Freight route map is ambitious and may be hard to mock convincingly
